title: cinnamomum jensenianum
intro: Cinnamomum jensenianum, also known as Jensen's cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, native to Taiwan. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of cinnamaldehyde, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cinnamomum jensenianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
